title: ToolProjection
description: Callable view of a governed capability for a specific host surface (CLI, MCP, OpenAI function calling, HTTP, etc.). A projection is one possible incarnation of a capability — not the canonical authority for the underlying contract.

projectionKind.description: The host-interface category for this projection.

name.description: Tool/model name exposed to the agent or model (e.g. 'memory-search', 'repo-status').

description.description: Human-readable description of what the tool does.

inputSchemaRef.description: Reference to a JSON Schema that defines the tool's input shape (e.g. 'https://elegy/contracts/schemas/memory-search-input.schema.json'). Required for machine-invokable projections.

outputSchemaRef.description: Reference to a JSON Schema that defines the tool's expected output shape. Required for machine-invokable projections.

invocationEnvelope.description: How the tool is invoked and how results are returned.

requestSchemaRef.description: Reference to the invocation-request schema envelope used by this projection.

responseSchemaRef.description: Reference to the invocation-response schema envelope used by this projection.

sideEffectClass.description: Side-effect classification for host policy evaluation.

isDeterministic.description: Whether this tool always produces the same output for the same input.

dependencyRequirements.description: External dependencies or secrets this tool needs to operate.

secrets.description: Secret keys or environment variables required.

services.description: External services this tool depends on (e.g. 'ollama', 'git').

filesystem.description: File paths or patterns this tool reads or writes.

provenance.description: How this projection was created and what capability it derives from.

sourceCapabilityId.description: The governed capability id this projection was derived from.

generatedBy.description: What system or process generated this projection.

generatedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when this projection was generated.

projectionVersion.description: Semver version of the projection rules used.

frozenTool.description: Metadata for promoted deterministic tools with validation evidence.

inputExamples.description: Validated example inputs with expected outputs.

validationEvidence.description: Reference to validation evidence (test run, contract test output).

fallbackBehavior.description: What to do when this tool fails: retry, degrade, abort.
